title: KG Inicis Identity Verification
description: Connects KG Inicis identity verification service to the G7 core IDV infrastructure.

settings.title: KG Inicis Identity Verification Settings
settings.description: Configure operation mode, live credentials, and duplicate-check basis.

info.activation: IDV activation is configured under [Settings > Identity Verification].
info.logs: Inicis verification history can be viewed in [Admin > Identity Logs] by filtering with 'KG Inicis Identity Verification'.

settings.test_mode_hint: In test mode, the plugin operates with the public Inicis test account and no real verification occurs.
settings.live_mode_warning_body: Live mode performs verification with your real merchant MID. Enter your Live MID and API key before going live.
settings.live_mid_hint: Inicis live merchant MIDs start with SRB (e.g., SRB1234567). Required before switching to Live mode.

duplicate_field.label: Duplicate Check Basis
duplicate_field.hint: DI identifies duplicates only within this merchant; CI works across all institutions. (default: DI)
duplicate_field.warning: Changing this in production may temporarily make existing-user duplicate checks incomplete.

duplicate_block_enabled.label: Block Duplicate Registration
duplicate_block_enabled.hint: When enabled, blocks registration if the verified person has previously registered with a different email. Disable for scenarios such as shared family phones or B2B sites where one person legitimately operates multiple accounts. (default: Enabled)
duplicate_block_enabled.note: Regardless of this setting, re-registration with the same email is always blocked (core default).

duplicate_field.hint: DI identifies duplicates only within this merchant; CI works across all institutions.
duplicate_field.warning: Changing this in production may temporarily make existing-user duplicate checks incomplete.

modal.title: KG Inicis Identity Verification
modal.description: Uses KG Inicis integrated authentication for secure identity verification.
modal.adult_description: Verifies that you are 19 or older via KG Inicis integrated authentication. You will be returned to the previous screen after verification.

in_progress.title: Please complete verification in the popup window
in_progress.hint: If you don't see the popup, please disable your browser's popup blocker.

modal.popup_blocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups in your browser and try again.
modal.payload_not_ready: Verification payload is not ready. Please try again in a moment.

pending.title: No identity verification record.
pending.hint: You will be guided to verify when identity verification is required (password reset, profile change, etc.).

errors.invalid_auth_url: Forged verification response. Not a valid Inicis domain.
errors.decrypt_failed: Failed to decrypt verification data. Please try again.
errors.remote_call_failed: Failed to communicate with the Inicis verification server. Please try again later.
errors.not_found: Verification record not found. Please re-verify.
errors.already_consumed: This verification has already been consumed.
errors.binding_mismatch: The verified identity does not match the target account.
errors.not_adult: This service requires adult verification. Only users aged 19 or older can use it.
errors.incomplete_identity: The identity verification data is incomplete. Please try again with a different verification method.
errors.storage_failed: Failed to save the identity verification data. Please try again later.
errors.verify_failed: Identity verification failed. Please try again.

adult_verification.label: Adult Verification (KG Inicis identity verification only)
adult_verification.description: Map this purpose only to the KG Inicis provider. Mail/SMS providers do not return date of birth and cannot determine adult status. Incorrect mapping may expose adult content to minors.
